problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: The key to What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? is Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) — specifically Two-dimensional material stacking — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
